Current Assignment Completion (Line)

Cumulative completion % for active not-yet-due assignments

Current Assignment Completion (Bar by Level)

Tracks class assignment records with due dates; standalone auto-imported exercise rows (due = submitted) are excluded so unassigned practice does not create fake pending assignments.

Detail buttons open not-completed-yet student lists for reminders before due date.

Performance reports [input]

Teacher-facing report builder. Student and family visibility is delivered through the scheduled email message.

Class Levels

Student Progress Report

Class Focus

Performance Snapshot (Auto from records)

Behavior = mean of Behavior scores; Skills = mean of Skills scores; Academic = mean of exercise/quiz/exam scores (current quarter); Homework Timeliness % = on-time/tracked assignments (current quarter); Assignment Completion % = completed/tracked assignments (current quarter).

Corrective Action Shorthand

Focus any corrective-action textarea in Skills/Conduct, then insert shorthand. Free text remains fully editable.

Basic Student Skills

Skill x/5
Recommendations / Corrective action required
Leverages computer/phone daily to read international news (for Flyers and above only).
Leverages computer/phone to read for enjoyment in English (for Flyers and above only).
Leverages computer/phone to look up, translate, and hear new vocabulary (for Flyers and above only).
Writes notes independently.
Asks questions in real-time whenever needed.
Consistently studies class notes outside of class.
Reviews notes before attending class.
Demonstrates age-appropriate memory recall by remembering to study lessons, complete homework, and ask questions well.
Knows and uses Eagles Club Notebook extensive grammar references, word lists, and speaking practice drills.
Uses English phonics, vowel sound spelling patterns, and syllabication well.
Reads, listens to, and watches English content regularly.
Demonstrates logical thinking abilities.

Conduct During Class

Conduct metric x/5
Recommendations / Corrective action required
Does not talk to others during lessons; listens while others speak.
Has age-appropriate control of emotions.
Always cheerfully follows in-class teacher instructions; cooperative.
Displays age-appropriate maturity.
Can easily concentrate, follow along, and stay on task during class.
Respects classroom, desks, computers, and TV in room; keeps area clean.
Always brings Eagles Club notebook and 2 pencils with an eraser attached every class.
Learns from mistakes and successes.
Shows effort to remember lessons well.
Asks for help when translation/explanation is needed.
Covers mouth and/or nose when yawning, coughing, or sneezing.
Regularly washes hands and understands self-protection from transmission.
Never sticks fingers in eyes, nose, or mouth; always uses tissue/handkerchief instead.

Grades Pulse (mobile-first)

Each lane plots grade % over time with a calculated trendline overlay. Switch period windows and group by class, student, or school.

Use the tabulator matrix for school-wide grade exploration with sticky identity columns and fast column controls.

Role Permissions Matrix

Define starting page and exposed sections/functions for admin, teacher, student, and parent.

School Setup

Set school profile, logo, and first/last school day. The system splits 4 near-equal quarters and adjusts quarter-end dates to weekdays.

No logo uploaded

Format: LETTER:min-max, one row per line. This mapping is shared globally for grade bands.

Quarter Start End Days
Set first and last school day to generate quarters.

School setup is using default school-year dates.
